title: HorrorMon - Creepypasta Forms
description: Cobblemon datapack that adds custom fakemon based around internet horror, creepypastas, and other spooky things
body:
This is a Cobblemon datapack that adds pokémon custom forms based around internet horror, creepypastas, and other spo0oOoky things...

![Five Nights at Freddy's Vulpix, Teddiursa, Buneary, and Psyduck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513616f476f0800bb2bf2364571514fef347dcc4.png)

Version 1.0 Forms:
- Five Nights at Freddy's Vulpix, Teddiursa, Psyduck, and Buneary
- Slenderman Stufful and Bewear
- Sonic.exe Sandshrew and Sandslash
- SCP-173 Bonsly and Sudowoodo
- Wendigo Sawsbuck

All forms have the "horror" aspect. So for instance, to give yourself a FNAF Teddiursa, use 
```
/pokegive teddiursa horror
```
